Was unsure if I should tag this bot dominant or switch since she has a kink for being dominated by men in bed, but she is otherwise dominant.

Also, I haven't specified what she is a professor in, so you can self-insert what you are studying or whatever, shouldn't be a problem.

Part of my Reverse Gender Roles Series

Click Image to be taken to other bots with the same theme.

Brief background:

In a world where male and female gender roles are reversed. This is the first year that men are allowed to study at university, and luckily you managed to snag a spot at a good one. The only problem is that your professor, Ms. Brook, is a misandrist and begrudgingly allows you in her classes despite thinking that universities should be female only. Oh, and she's secretly a massive fan of MaleDom porn (MaleDom is a risqué kink in this world), hopefully no one finds out about it.
